creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Fix plist with WITHOUT_GTK2/WITHOUT_GUI/WITHOUT_X11 defined.

Port maintainer (mono@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99

How-To-Repeat: 
% cd /usr/ports/devel/mono-addins
% make WITHOUT_GTK2=yes package
...
